title: evax verna var. drummondii
intro: Evax verna var. drummondii, also known as Drummond's evax or Drummond's evax verna, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Evax verna var. drummondii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
